module.name: common
module.purpose: Shared interfaces used across the second-generation source tree, including typed TOML configuration with deployable runtime loading, optional core settings, agent-owned bind address settings, directional chat request/response message envelopes, shared channel errors, remoc session/task protocol messages, explicit public/private Rust section markers where private shared implementation details exist, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.

childModules.name: channel
childModules.purpose: Shared channel error type and crate-internal remoc SessionEvent protocol with separate request-message and response-message task payloads.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Strongly typed TOML configuration loader with source-tree, deployment-root, and environment-selected config discovery, optional core settings, agent-owned bind address settings, alias substitution, and credential resolution.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Crate-local third-party library namespace wrappers used by source modules instead of importing external crates directly.

childModules.name: message
childModules.purpose: Folder-based shared request and response message traits, serializable envelopes, complete chat request payloads, and streamed chat response segment payloads.
